arts.ttl: Napoli President Responds to Conte Recent Criticism
arts.sum: Napoli president Aurelio De Laurentiis hit back at frustrated manager Antonio Conte in his latest interview. Speaking to Radio Crc via Gazzetta dello Sport, the controversial filmmaker blasted his coach for disrupting the harmony at Stadio Diego Maradona amid an intense Serie A title race. The post Napoli President Responds to Conte Recent Criticism appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
